task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus as the administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus interface is visible, and the user profile or session indicates 'administrator' is logged in.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct service request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The request details page is open for the ticket titled 'Email account not working - cannot send or receive emails'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the interface to add a note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Add Note' dialog, modal, or text area is visible on the screen within the context of the target request.

task_completion.description: Verify the exact required text was entered into the note body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Investigated the issue. Found that the mail server configuration was changed during last week update. Reverting settings now.' is visible in the note input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the note is configured to be internal (not visible to the requester).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Show to requester' checkbox is left unchecked, or an explicit 'Internal Note' option is selected before saving.

task_completion.description: Verify the note was saved and added to the request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly created note appears in the request's 'Notes' or 'History' section with the correct text and an indicator that it is an internal/technician note.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface in a browser, rather than using a terminal to send curl/API requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to insert the note.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL INSERT commands or database client interactions.

integrity.description: Verify the text was entered into the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The note text is typed directly into the ServiceDesk Plus web page, not into a separate text editor or notepad application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target request subject: 'Email account not working - cannot send or receive emails'. Required note text: 'Investigated the issue. Found that the mail server configuration was changed during last week update. Reverting settings now.'. Note type: Internal (must not be visible to requester, e.g., 'Show to requester' checkbox must be unchecked).
